---
title: "figure 3"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    code_folding: hide
    toc: true
date: "2026-03-31"
---


```{r, message=F, warning=F}
rm(list=ls())
library(rprojroot)
library(dplyr)
root <- rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file()
```




```{r, message=F, warning=F}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)

path="C:\\han\\Projects\\ShareShengtong\\ShareShengtong\\EpiBmal1Cerebellum\\Draft\\Files\\"

venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre_Common_DownRGs=read_xlsx(paste0(path, "venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre-Common_DownRGs.xlsx"))

venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre_Common_UpRGs=read_xlsx(paste0(path, "venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre-Common_UpRGs.xlsx"))

venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre_Uniq_Gained_UpRGs=read_xlsx(paste0(path, "venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre-Uniq-Gained_UpRGs.xlsx"))

venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre_Uniq_Lost_DownRGs=read_xlsx(paste0(path, "venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre-Uniq-Lost_DownRGs.xlsx"))



Uniq_Cre_Gained_gene=as_tibble(read.csv(file.path(root, "../Data/Figures_Generation_Data/figure_2B_Uniq_Cre_Gained_gene.csv")))

Uniq_Cre_Lost_gene=as_tibble(read.csv(file.path(root, "../Data/Figures_Generation_Data/figure_2B_Uniq_Cre_Lost_gene.csv")))

Common_enhancer_gene=as_tibble(read.csv(file.path(root, "../Data/Figures_Generation_Data/figure_2B_Common_enhancer_gene.csv")))

```



## Figure 3C 


```{r, message=F, warning=F}
library(ggvenn)

UpRGS=c(venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre_Uniq_Gained_UpRGs$`Cre-Uniq-Gained 竏ｩ UpRGs`, venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre_Uniq_Gained_UpRGs$UpRGs)

UpRGS=UpRGS[!is.na(UpRGS)]


library(VennDiagram)

venn_list <- list(UpGs = UpRGS, `Uniq-Cre-Gained` = Uniq_Cre_Gained_gene$x)

ggvenn(venn_list, 
       fill_color = c("lightblue", "skyblue"),
       stroke_size = 0.8,         # Slightly thicker border for "pop"
       set_name_size = 6,         # Makes "UpGs" and "Uniq-Cre-Gained" larger
       text_size = 8,             # Makes the numbers (172, 4, 452) clearer
       show_percentage = FALSE) + # Usually cleaner for publication
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)) +
  # This line forces the set names to be bold if your system supports it
  annotate("text", x = -0.8, y = 1.2, label = "", fontface = "bold")
```




```{r, message=F, warning=F}
library(DT)
library(magrittr)

# 1. Define vectors from your venn_list
upgs_vec <- venn_list$UpGs
uniq_cre_vec <- venn_list$`Uniq-Cre-Gained`
overlap_vec <- intersect(upgs_vec, uniq_cre_vec)

# 2. Determine max length and pad
max_ln <- max(length(upgs_vec), length(uniq_cre_vec), length(overlap_vec))

# 3. Create dataframe and replace NAs with empty strings ""
gene_comp_df <- data.frame(
  UpGs = `length<-`(upgs_vec, max_ln),
  Uniq_Cre_Gained = `length<-`(uniq_cre_vec, max_ln),
  Overlapping_Genes = `length<-`(overlap_vec, max_ln)
)

# Replace all NA values globally in the dataframe
gene_comp_df[is.na(gene_comp_df)] <- ""

# 4. Output using your DT configuration
gene_comp_df %>%
  datatable(
    extensions = 'Buttons',
    caption = "UpGs vs Uniq-Cre-Gained", 
    options = list(
      dom = 'Blfrtip',
      buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print'),
      lengthMenu = list(c(10, 25, 50, -1), c(10, 25, 50, "All"))
    )
  )
```






```{r, message=F, warning=F}
DownRGS=c(venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre_Uniq_Lost_DownRGs$`Cre-Uniq-Lost 竏ｩ DownRGs`, venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre_Uniq_Lost_DownRGs$DownRGs)

DownRGS=DownRGS[!is.na(DownRGS)]


library(VennDiagram)

venn_list <- list(DownGs = DownRGS, `Uniq-Cre-Lost` = Uniq_Cre_Lost_gene$x)

ggvenn(venn_list, 
       fill_color = c("lightblue", "skyblue"),
       stroke_size = 0.8,         # Slightly thicker border for "pop"
       set_name_size = 6,         # Makes "UpGs" and "Uniq-Cre-Gained" larger
       text_size = 8,             # Makes the numbers (172, 4, 452) clearer
       show_percentage = FALSE) + # Usually cleaner for publication
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)) +
  # This line forces the set names to be bold if your system supports it
  annotate("text", x = -0.8, y = 1.2, label = "", fontface = "bold")
```




```{r, message=F, warning=F}
library(DT)
library(magrittr)

# 1. Define vectors from your venn_list
DownRGS_vec <- venn_list$DownGs
uniq_cre_vec <- venn_list$`Uniq-Cre-Lost`
overlap_vec <- intersect(DownRGS_vec, uniq_cre_vec)

# 2. Determine max length and pad
max_ln <- max(length(DownRGS_vec), length(uniq_cre_vec), length(overlap_vec))

# 3. Create dataframe and replace NAs with empty strings ""
gene_comp_df <- data.frame(
  DownGs = `length<-`(DownRGS_vec, max_ln),
  Uniq_Cre_Lost = `length<-`(uniq_cre_vec, max_ln),
  Overlapping_Genes = `length<-`(overlap_vec, max_ln)
)

# Replace all NA values globally in the dataframe
gene_comp_df[is.na(gene_comp_df)] <- ""

# 4. Output using your DT configuration
gene_comp_df %>%
  datatable(
    extensions = 'Buttons',
    caption = "UpGs vs Uniq-Cre-Lost", 
    options = list(
      dom = 'Blfrtip',
      buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print'),
      lengthMenu = list(c(10, 25, 50, -1), c(10, 25, 50, "All"))
    )
  )
```


## Figure 3D 


```{r, message=F, warning=F}
library(ggvenn)

UpRGS=c(venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre_Uniq_Gained_UpRGs$`Cre-Uniq-Gained 竏ｩ UpRGs`, venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre_Uniq_Gained_UpRGs$UpRGs)

UpRGS=UpRGS[!is.na(UpRGS)]


library(VennDiagram)

venn_list <- list(UpGs = UpRGS, Common = Common_enhancer_gene$x)

ggvenn(venn_list, 
       fill_color = c("lightblue", "skyblue"),
       stroke_size = 0.8,         # Slightly thicker border for "pop"
       set_name_size = 6,         # Makes "UpGs" and "Uniq-Cre-Gained" larger
       text_size = 8,             # Makes the numbers (172, 4, 452) clearer
       show_percentage = FALSE) + # Usually cleaner for publication
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)) +
  # This line forces the set names to be bold if your system supports it
  annotate("text", x = -0.8, y = 1.2, label = "", fontface = "bold")
```


```{r, message=F, warning=F}
DownRGS=c(venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre_Uniq_Lost_DownRGs$`Cre-Uniq-Lost 竏ｩ DownRGs`, venn_Fig3OfASD_Cre_Uniq_Lost_DownRGs$DownRGs)

DownRGS=DownRGS[!is.na(DownRGS)]


library(VennDiagram)

venn_list <- list(DownGs = DownRGS, Common = Common_enhancer_gene$x)

ggvenn(venn_list, 
       fill_color = c("lightblue", "skyblue"),
       stroke_size = 0.8,         # Slightly thicker border for "pop"
       set_name_size = 6,         # Makes "UpGs" and "Uniq-Cre-Gained" larger
       text_size = 8,             # Makes the numbers (172, 4, 452) clearer
       show_percentage = FALSE) + # Usually cleaner for publication
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)) +
  # This line forces the set names to be bold if your system supports it
  annotate("text", x = -0.8, y = 1.2, label = "", fontface = "bold")
```
